# Connector Handoff Checklist (What I Need From You)

Use this checklist to complete the omnichannel mini-me setup.
Do not commit actual secrets to git.

## 1) Accounts and access

- [ ] Canva account access confirmed
- [ ] Zeely account access confirmed
- [ ] Gumroad owner/admin access confirmed
- [ ] Beehiiv owner/admin access confirmed
- [ ] askdogood@gmail.com access confirmed
- [ ] Claude access method confirmed (API or manual)
- [ ] Emergent access confirmed
- [ ] Beautiful.ai access confirmed
- [ ] Manus access confirmed

## 2) Credentials or tokens (share securely, not in repo)

- [ ] Gumroad API token
- [ ] Beehiiv API key
- [x] Beehiiv publication ID: pub_82c2e68c-a3f8-4fa4-a7fd-29bf9355e4c1
- [ ] Google app password or OAuth workflow for askdogood@gmail.com
- [ ] Claude/Anthropic API key (if API route)
- [ ] Zeely token/access details (if available)
- [ ] Canva API/access details (if available)
- [ ] Emergent access details
- [ ] Beautiful.ai access details
- [ ] Manus access details

## 3) Subscriber list source of truth

- [ ] Export latest Beehiiv subscribers CSV
- [ ] Export Mailchimp subscribers CSV (if applicable)
- [ ] Export any old Azure/CRM list CSV (if applicable)
- [ ] Confirm one master cleaned CSV with deduped emails
- [ ] Confirm segment tags (engaged, warm, inactive, buyers, leads)

## 4) Brand voice anchors (confirm/adjust)

- [ ] Warm, direct, practical, culturally grounded
- [ ] No fluff, no fake urgency
- [ ] Mission phrases approved:
  - eat to live, never live to eat
  - discipline is freedom
  - pay it forward
- [ ] Medical compliance boundaries approved

## 5) First launch campaign settings

- [ ] Primary offer URL
- [ ] Lead magnet URL
- [ ] Weekly budget cap
- [ ] Preferred send days/times for Gmail and Beehiiv
- [ ] Top 3 channels this week (FB, Nextdoor, email, Zeely, etc.)

## 6) Done definition

- [ ] One-week omnichannel plan generated
- [ ] Gmail blast drafted and scheduled
- [ ] Beehiiv campaign drafted and scheduled
- [ ] Zeely assets and copy prepared
- [ ] Canva asset requests/specs prepared
- [ ] KPI scorecard set for weekly optimization

## Confirmed in this session

- Permission status: Subscriber list is confirmed permission-based for marketing emails.
- Subscriber file validated: 1510 rows, 1510 valid emails, 0 duplicates in the provided CSV.
